scripts.test:contracts: rm -rf .tmp-contract-tests && npx tsc -p tsconfig.contract-tests.json && mkdir -p .tmp-contract-tests/packages/contracts && rm -rf .tmp-contract-tests/packages/contracts/node_modules && ln -s ../../../packages/contracts/node_modules .tmp-contract-tests/packages/contracts/node_modules && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --test contract-tests/*.test.mjs
